# Rensto - AI Automation & Operating Systems

Rensto architects and deploys high-performance AI automation systems for businesses ready to automate their sales, fulfillment, and internal operations.

## Core Products & Services

- **WhatsApp OS**: Elite-level AI WhatsApp architecture for sales and support.
- **Custom AI Solutions**: End-to-end custom automation development.
- **Automation Marketplace**: Pre-built workflow templates for immediate deployment.
- **Care Plans**: Dedicated ongoing support and system optimization.

## Standardized Pricing (2026)

### One-Time Services
- **Automation Audit**: $497
- **Sprint Planning**: $1,497
- **AI Content Engine**: $997
- **Lead Intake Agent**: $997

### Monthly Care Plans
- **Starter Care**: $497/mo (5 hours support)
- **Growth Care**: $997/mo (15 hours support)
- **Scale Care**: $2,497/mo (40 hours support)

### WhatsApp OS
- **Base Instance**: $249/mo
- **Setup Fee**: $497
- **Extra Numbers**: $149/mo (+ $99 setup)

## Integration Points
- **API Documentation**: https://rensto.com/docs
- **Client Dashboard**: https://rensto.com/app/dashboard
- **Marketplace**: https://rensto.com/marketplace

## Contact & Intake
- **Booking**: https://rensto.com/contact
- **Support**: Integrated "Magic Button" in client dashboard for autonomous support.
